pending.name: The Banking Era
stages: 🐛 Bug fixes — NPC arena uses party only, NPC AI sharpens (charges + switches), arena rewards rebalanced
🌲 Hunting — no mid-hunt healing, increased difficulty
🕒 Daily / Weekly timers fixed (real next-claim time)
🏦 BANKS — store Lucons safely, Alverah taxes daily/weekly claims by % of total wealth
🥷 ROBBERY — Snatch Glove (3 tiers: 5s / 3s / 2s defend windows). Defender's aura = damage on failed snatch.
💰 .wealth — bank + wallet + total + your wealth-lb position
🎭 Profile mask — sold in market, hides .profile from others
🏅 Achievements — unlock rewards + .equip-achievement to show on .rank
📉 Lucon weight on global leaderboard reduced
